Plaintiff contested the Court's tentative ruling late. all parties are present. Judge allows argument.

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS M.A. SILVA CORKS USA, LLC, NEIL FOSTER'S Motion For Award Of Attorneys Fees. The Court grants plaintiffs request for a brief continuance and the motion is continued to November 17, 2023 at 9:30 a.m. Dept. 302. Opposition due by November 13, 2023. Reply per statute.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)

**Following today's hearing the Court notes that it inadvertenly set this matter for a Friday. Judge Ulmer does not preside over the calender on Friday's. The Court directs counsel to meet and confer on one of the following new dates: 11/20/23, 11/21/23 or 11/22/23. Partes are to confirm the new date via email at contestdept302tr@sftc.org.**
